testcase.name: listThrowsStoreExceptionWhenDbPathIsUnavailable
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: listReturnsUnavailableWhenPostgresNetworkIsUnreachable
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-24T21:27:12.772+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Starting... 2026-03-24T21:27:12.779+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Start completed. 2026-03-24T21:27:14.303+05:30 ERROR 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=db_operation_failed component=check_run_store operation=initialize_check_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 contract_id=- commit_sha=- sql_state=- sql_vendor_code=- error_type=FlywaySqlException error_message=Unable to obtain connection from database: check-run-store-pool - Connection is not available, request timed out after 250ms (total=0, active=0, idle=0, waiting=0) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SQL State : 08001 Error Code : 0 Message : Connection to 127.0.0.1:1 refused. Check that the hostname and port are correct and that the postmaster is accepting TCP/IP connections.
2026-03-24T21:27:14.303+05:30 WARN 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=check_store_init_deferred component=check_run_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 message=Will retry on first checks request 2026-03-24T21:27:15.841+05:30 ERROR 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=db_operation_failed component=check_run_store operation=initialize_check_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 contract_id=- commit_sha=- sql_state=- sql_vendor_code=- error_type=FlywaySqlException error_message=Unable to obtain connection from database: check-run-store-pool - Connection is not available, request timed out after 255ms (total=0, active=0, idle=0, waiting=0) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SQL State : 08001 Error Code : 0 Message : Connection to 127.0.0.1:1 refused. Check that the hostname and port are correct and that the postmaster is accepting TCP/IP connections.
